calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3953-3955 Sacramento Street San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

The Buyers were present in Court. The sale was confirmed at $1,475,000.00. Bond is waived. The Court granted the petition (subject to the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Petition For Authority To Sell Ral Property And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Right To Sell Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Debra Dolch, Trustee).

After noting that counsel requested a hearing on the matter to assure an opportunity for interested persons to object and noting no objections, the Court granted the Petition, signing the order for same in open court.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Leticia Perez CSR# 7782; Bailiff: Deputy Mizota; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
